assertions.assertion: Response includes updating the .NET target framework as one of the first steps
Response includes replacing IdentityServer4 NuGet packages with Duende equivalents
Response includes updating namespaces from IdentityServer4 to Duende.IdentityServer
Response includes creating and applying EF Core database migrations for both ConfigurationDbContext and PersistedGrantDbContext
assertions.rationale: Standard EF Core migration step known from IS4 docs

assertions.assertion: Response includes configuring a license key for Duende IdentityServer
Response includes verifying the deployment (e.g., checking discovery document, testing token issuance)
assertions.rationale: The specific verification steps (discovery document, token issuance testing) may not be explicitly included in generic migration advice
